quests.title: First Steps
quests.description: Learn the basics of survival in VibeMMO by speaking with the Town Herald and defeating some zombies.

offer.text: The lands beyond the town are dangerous. Could you help me with something?
offer.speaker: Town Herald

offer.text: The Quartermaster has supplies you need, and there are zombies to the east. I need you to speak with the Quartermaster and defeat 3 zombies.
offer.speaker: Town Herald

offer.text: Wonderful! Speak with the Quartermaster first, then head east to kill zombies. Return to me when done.
offer.speaker: Town Herald

offer.text: Very well. Return if you change your mind.
offer.speaker: Town Herald

inProgress.text: You haven't finished yet. The Quartermaster is to the south, and zombies are to the east.
inProgress.speaker: Town Herald

complete.text: Excellent work, adventurer! You've proven yourself capable. Here is your reward.
complete.speaker: Town Herald
